name: Real-Time Social + News Sentiment Alpha
description: NLP models (BERT-based FinBERT, GPT-4o) continuously score Reddit WallStreetBets, Twitter/X financial accounts, SeekingAlpha, Bloomberg, and Reuters articles for each covered stock. Aggregated and decay-weighted sentiment scores drive long/short signals with 1-3 day holding periods.
core_logic: raw_scores = [NLP(article_i) for article_i in news_feed]. sentiment_t = exp_decay_avg(raw_scores, halflife=3d). BUY when sentiment_t > threshold, SELL when < -threshold.

risk.main_risk: Sentiment manipulation; bots and fake news

cons: Signal crowded by 2025 as FinBERT widely adopted
key_papers: Twitter Mood Predicts the Stock Market (Bollen 2011)
signal_buy: Decay-weighted sentiment score > 0.30 with volume confirmation
signal_sell: Decay-weighted sentiment score < -0.30 with volume confirmation
